task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the Quality Alerts section in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible, showing the Quality app or the list of Quality Alerts.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the correct quality alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form view for the quality alert titled 'Material Hardness Below Specification' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates the Preventive Action field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent has navigated to the correct tab or section within the alert form (e.g., 'Preventive Actions') where the Preventive Action text area is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the exact required text into the Preventive Action field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Preventive Action' field is populated with the text: 'Implement mandatory incoming material hardness testing for all new supplier batches before acceptance. Update supplier quality agreement to require Brinell hardness certificates with every delivery. Establish automated rejection criteria in ERP for batches failing hardness threshold.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating to localhost:8069 and interacting with the Odoo GUI, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like `curl`, `psql`, or python scripts being used to directly modify the Odoo database or API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target quality alert is titled 'Material Hardness Below Specification'. The agent must enter the following exact text into the Preventive Action field: 'Implement mandatory incoming material hardness testing for all new supplier batches before acceptance. Update supplier quality agreement to require Brinell hardness certificates with every delivery. Establish automated rejection criteria in ERP for batches failing hardness threshold.' Odoo 17 generally auto-saves when clicking outside a field, so the final state should show this text fully entered in the correct field.
